channel.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Jun 2nd, 2021
item.description:
Projects

Verified Software

  • Vélus - Verified compiler for a Lustre/Scade-like dataflow synchronous language.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Dec 6th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Package and Build Management

  • Nix Coq packages - Collection of Coq-related packages for Nix.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Nov 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Projects

User Interfaces

  • VSCoqstars147 - Extension for the Visual Studio Code editor.

    • Projects

    Libraries

  • Simple IOstars19 - Input/output monad with user-definable primitive operations.

    • Projects

    Package and Build Management

  • coq_makefile - Build tool distributed with Coq and based on generating a makefile.

    • Projects

    Tools

  • hs-to-coqstars32 - Converter from Haskell code to equivalent Coq code.
  • Roosterizestars11 - Tool for suggesting lemma names in Coq projects.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Oct 20th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Frameworks

  • FCFstars34 - Framework for proofs of cryptography.

    • Projects

    Tools

  • Ottstars202 - Tool for writing definitions of programming languages and calculi that can be translated to Coq.

    • Projects

    Type Theory and Mathematics

  • Coqtail Mathstars7 - Library of mathematical results ranging from arithmetic to real and complex analysis.

    • Resources

    Blogs

  • PLClub Blog
  • Thomas Letan's blog posts on Coq

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Sep 10th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Libraries

  • TLCstars13 - Non-constructive alternative to Coq's standard library.

    • Projects

    Package and Build Management

  • Coq Platformstars31 - Experimental curated collection of packages to support Coq use in industry, education, and research.

    • Projects

    Tools

  • coq2htmlstars20 - Alternative HTML documentation generator for Coq.

    • Projects

    Type Theory and Mathematics

  • Completeness and Decidability of Modal Logic Calculistars3 - Soundness, completeness, and decidability for the logics K, K*, CTL, and PDL.
  • CoqPrimestars14 - Library for certifying primality using Pocklington and Elliptic Curve certificates.
  • Finmapstars37 - Extension of Mathematical Components with finite maps, sets, and multisets.
  • Gaiastars7 - Implementation of books from Bourbaki's Elements of Mathematics, including set theory and number theory.

    • Resources

    Community

  • Planet Coq link aggregator

    • Resources

    Books

  • Program Logics for Certified Compilers - Book that explains how to construct program logics using separation logic, accompanied by a formal model in Coq which is applied to the Clight programming language and other examples.

    • Resources

    Course Material

  • Foundations of Separation Logic - Introduction to using separation logic to reason about sequential imperative programs in Coq.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Aug 19th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Type Theory and Mathematics

  • Puiseuxthstars3 - Proof of Puiseux's theorem and computation of roots of polynomials of Puiseux's series.

    • Resources

    Community

  • Official Coq standard library

    • Resources

    Blogs

  • MIT PLV blog posts on Coq

    • Resources

    Course Material

  • Introduction to Computational Logic - Introduction to basic logic principles, constructive type theory, and interactive theorem proving with Coq.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq May 31st, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Libraries

  • Coq record updatestars28 - Library which provides a generic way to update Coq record fields.

    • Projects

    Package and Build Management

  • Coq-community Templatesstars8 - Templates for generating configuration files for Coq projects.
  • Docker-Coq-action - GitHub container action that can be used with Docker-Coq or Docker-MathComp.
  • Dune - Composable and opinionated build system for Coq and OCaml (former jbuilder).

    • Projects

    Plugins

  • Hierarchy Builderstars43 - Collection of commands for declaring Coq hierarchies based on packed classes.

    • Projects

    Type Theory and Mathematics

  • Graph Theorystars13 - Formalized graph theory results.

    • Resources

    Community

  • Official Coq Zulip chat

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Mar 20th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Verified Software

  • Incremental Cycles - Verified OCaml implementation of an algorithm for incremental cycle detection in graphs.

    • Resources

    Community

  • Official Coq manual

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Feb 26th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Libraries

  • Monaestars48 - Monadic effects and equational reasoning.

    • Projects

    Package and Build Management

  • Docker-MathCompstars4 - Docker images for many combinations of versions of Coq and the Mathematical Components library.

    • Projects

    Type Theory and Mathematics

  • Infotheostars42 - Formalization of information theory and linear error-correcting codes.

    • Resources

    Books

  • The Mathematical Components book - Book oriented towards mathematically inclined users, focusing on the Mathematical Components library and the SSReflect proof language.

    • Resources

    Tutorials and Hints

  • Coq'Art Exercises and Tutorialsstars39 - Coq code and exercises from the Coq'Art book, including additional tutorials.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Feb 24th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Libraries

  • Formalised Undecidable Problemsstars64 - Library of undecidable problems and reductions between them.
  • Regular Language Representationsstars23 - Translations between different definitions of regular languages, including regular expressions and automata.

    • Projects

    Plugins

  • Ltac2 - Experimental typed tactic language similar to Coq's classic Ltac language.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Feb 20th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Package and Build Management

  • Nix - Package manager for Linux and other Unix systems, supporting atomic upgrades and rollbacks.
  • OPAM - Flexible and Git-friendly package manager for OCaml with multiple compiler support.

    • Projects

    Tools

  • CFML - Tool for proving properties of OCaml programs in separation logic.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Feb 7th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Libraries

  • ALEAstars8 - Library for reasoning on randomized algorithms.
  • Hahnstars23 - Library for reasoning on lists and binary relations.

    • Projects

    Tools

  • Cosettestars540 - Automated solver for reasoning about SQL query equivalences.
  • SerAPIstars91 - Library and tools for (de)serialization of Coq code to and from JSON and S-expressions.

    • Resources

    Community

  • Official Coq wiki
  • Official Coq Twitter
  • coq-community package maintenance projectstars58
  • Coq tag on Stack Overflow
  • Coq tag on Theoretical Computer Science Stack Exchange

    • Resources

    Blogs

  • Coq Exchange: ideas and experiment reports about Coq
  • Guillaume Claret's Coq blog
  • Joachim Breitner's blog posts on Coq
  • Poleiro: a Coq blog by Arthur Azevedo de Amorim
  • Ralf Jung's blog posts on Coq

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Package and Build Management

  • Coq Package Index - OPAM-based collection of Coq packages.
  • Docker-Coqstars25 - Docker images for many versions of Coq.

    • Resources

    Books

  • Coq'Art - The first book dedicated to Coq.
  • Software Foundations - Series of Coq-based textbooks on logic, functional programming, and foundations of programming languages, aimed at being accessible to beginners.
  • Certified Programming with Dependent Types - Textbook about practical engineering with Coq which teaches advanced practical tricks and a very specific style of proof.
  • Formal Reasoning About Programs - Book that simultaneously provides a general introduction to formal logical reasoning about the correctness of programs and to using Coq for this purpose.
  • Programs and Proofs - Book that gives a brief and practically-oriented introduction to interactive proofs in Coq which emphasizes the computational nature of inductive reasoning about decidable propositions via a small set of primitives from the SSReflect proof language.
  • Computer Arithmetic and Formal Proofs - Book that describes how to formally specify and verify floating-point algorithms in Coq using the Flocq library.

    • Projects

    Frameworks

  • CoqEALstars49 - Framework to ease change of data representations in proofs.
  • Q*cert - Platform for implementing and verifying query compilers.

    • Projects

    Libraries

  • Metalibstars49 - Library for programming language metatheory using locally nameless variable binding representations.

    • Projects

    Tools

  • coq-toolsstars26 - Scripts to help construct small reproducing examples of bugs, remove unneeded imports, etc.
  • lngenstars27 - Tool for generating locally nameless Coq definitions and proofs.
  • mCoqstars17 - Mutation analysis tool for Coq projects.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Jan 18th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

User Interfaces

  • Proof General - Generic interface for proof assistants based on the extensible, customizable text editor Emacs.
  • Jupyter kernel for Coqstars52 - Coq support for the Jupyter Notebook web environment.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Jan 14th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Type Theory and Mathematics

  • Analysisstars90 - Library for classical real analysis compatible with Mathematical Components.
  • Coquelicot - Formalization of classical real analysis compatible with the standard library and focusing on usability.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Jan 13th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Type Theory and Mathematics

  • Category Theory in Coqstars571 - Axiom-free formalization of category theory.
  • Mathematical Components - Formalization of mathematical theories, focusing in particular on group theory.

    • Resources

    Tutorials and Hints

  • Coq in a Hurry - Introduction to how Coq can be used to define logical concepts and functions and reason about them.
  • CodeWars' Coq kata - Online proving challenges.
  • Lemma Overloadingstars18 - Demonstration of design patterns for programming and proving with canonical structures.
  • Mike Nahas's Coq Tutorial - Basics of using Coq to write formal proofs.
  • Tricks in Coqstars309 - Tips, tricks, and features that are hard to discover.

    • Projects

    Libraries

  • coq-haskellstars136 - Library smoothing the transition to Coq for Haskell users.

    • Projects

    Frameworks

  • FreeSpecstars41 - Framework for modularly verifying programs with effects and effect handlers.

    • Projects

    Plugins

  • SMTCoqstars93 - Tool that checks proof witnesses coming from external SAT and SMT solvers.
  • AAC Tacticsstars18 - Tactics for rewriting universally quantified equations, modulo associativity and commutativity of some operator.
  • Gappa - Tactic for discharging goals about floating-point arithmetic and round-off errors.
  • Mtac2stars44 - Plugin adding typed tactics for backward reasoning.

    • Projects

    Verified Software

  • JSCertstars187 - Coq specification of ECMAScript 5 (JavaScript) with verified reference interpreter.

    • Projects

    Tools

  • coq-dpdgraphstars57 - Tool for building dependency graphs between Coq objects.
  • Menhir - Parser generator that can output Coq code for verified parsers.

    • Resources

    Community

  • Mathematical Components wiki

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Jan 12th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Libraries

  • FCSL-PCMstars18 - Formalization of partial commutative monoids as used in verification of pointer-manipulating programs.
  • Bignumsstars18 - Library of arbitrary large numbers.
  • ExtLibstars103 - Collection of theories and plugins that may be useful in other Coq developments.
  • Flocq - Formalization of floating-point computations.
  • Paco - Library for parameterized coinduction.
  • Relation Algebrastars29 - Modular formalization of algebras with heterogeneous binary relations as models.

    • Projects

    Plugins

  • Unicoqstars37 - Plugin that replaces the existing unification algorithm with an enhanced one.
  • CoqHammerstars161 - General-purpose automated reasoning hammer tool that combines learning from previous proofs with the translation of problems to automated provers and the reconstruction of found proofs.
  • MetaCoqstars199 - Project formalizing Coq in Coq and providing tools for manipulating Coq terms and developing certified plugins.

    • Projects

    Type Theory and Mathematics

  • Four Color Theoremstars88 - Formal proof of the Four Color Theorem, a landmark result of graph theory.
  • GeoCoqstars130 - Formalization of geometry based on Tarski's axiom system.
  • Homotopy Type Theorystars970 - Development of homotopy-theoretic ideas.
  • Math Classesstars134 - Abstract interfaces for mathematical structures based on type classes.
  • Odd Order Theoremstars13 - Formal proof of the Odd Order Theorem, a landmark result of finite group theory.
  • UniMathstars682 - Library which aims to formalize a substantial body of mathematics using the univalent point of view.

    • Projects

    Verified Software

  • Fiat-Cryptostars382 - Cryptographic primitive code generation.
  • lambda-rust - Formal model of a Rust core language and type system, a logical relation for the type system, and safety proofs for some Rust libraries.

item.title: coq-community/awesome-coq Jan 10th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Plugins

  • Paramcoqstars33 - Plugin to generate parametricity translations of Coq terms.
  • Coq-Elpistars58 - Plugin for the Embeddable Lambda Prolog Interpreter.
  • Equationsstars163 - Function definition package for Coq.
  • QuickChickstars191 - Plugin for randomized property-based testing.

    • Projects

    Type Theory and Mathematics

  • CoRNstars98 - Library of constructive real analysis and algebra.

    • Projects

    Frameworks

  • Fiatstars120 - Mostly automated synthesis of correct-by-construction programs.
  • Iris - Higher-order concurrent separation logic framework.
  • Verdistars502 - Framework for formally verifying distributed systems implementations.
  • VST - Toolchain for verifying C code inside Coq in a higher-order concurrent, impredicative separation logic that is sound w.r.t. the Clight language of the CompCert compiler.

    • Projects

    User Interfaces

  • CoqIDE - Standalone graphical tool for interacting with Coq.
  • Coqtailstars115 - Interface for Coq based on the Vim text editor.
  • Company-Coqstars300 - IDE extensions for Proof General's Coq mode.
  • jsCoqstars389 - Port of Coq to JavaScript, which enables running Coq projects in a browser.

    • Projects

    Libraries

  • CoLoR - Library on rewriting theory, lambda-calculus and termination, with sub-libraries on common data structures extending the Coq standard library.
  • Coq-std++ - Extended alternative standard library for Coq.

    • Projects

    Tools

  • CoqOfOCamlstars130 - Tool for generating idiomatic Coq from OCaml code.

    • Projects

    Verified Software

  • CompCert - High-assurance compiler for almost all of the C language (ISO C99), generating efficient code for the PowerPC, ARM, RISC-V and x86 processors.
  • Verdi Raftstars148 - Implementation of the Raft distributed consensus protocol, verified in Coq using the Verdi framework.

    • Resources

    Community

  • Coq subreddit
  • Official Coq website
  • Official Coq Discourse forum
  • Official Coq-Club mailing list
